title: Manager, C&S
description:
Duties & Responsibilities:

  1. Responsible for providing a fully functional structural system, analysis and calculations to fulfill adequate structural integrity and accuracy of the design.
  2. Must be able to lead, manage and check all kinds of Civil and Structural Design drawings by members.
  3. Coordination with relevant departments during the Design stage.
  4. Ensure that all technical/detailed drawings are compliant with the relevant codes and/or regulatory requirements.
  5. Required to carry out work smoothly done on site and ensure handing over in accordance with schedule given.
  6. Ensure that all drawings must be done with constructability to site requirements, be practical, easy to understand, able to meet clients’ expectations and good profitability for the Company.
  7. To provide evaluation/findings and project results to HQ Tokyo in Japan on a frequent basis.

Requirements:

  1. Degree/Master in architecture or equivalent
  2. Minimum 5 years of working experience in the related field
  3. Proficient in Software such as AutoCAD, Revit, etc.
  4. Able to lead a team
  5. Fluency in spoken and written Japanese is necessary as the incumbent will be required to communicate and collaborate with counterparts in Japan, Tokyo Head Office such as monthly progress reports.
  6. Ability to prioritize tasks well and able to work independently
  7. Required to be resourceful, pay attention to details and has good communication skills.

postedCompany.description:
Takenaka Corporation has been incorporated in Singapore in 1974.  In its 46 years of establishment in Singapore, the company has built many prominent structures, such as Changi Airport Terminal 1, La Salle College of The Arts, National Gallery Singapore, CapitaGreen, Singapore Flyer, Changi Airport Terminal 4 and the ongoing Shimano New Factory as well as Changi Airport Terminal 2 Expansion Projects.


Since the founding of our business, we have consistently provided architectural structures that respond to the expectations of our customers based on our management philosophy, “Contribute to society by passing on the best works to future generations.” Today, we are being asked to contribute to solving large numbers of problems confronting our world on a global scale, including such issues as climate change and overpopulation.


By leveraging the strengths of our whole corporate group, we will contribute to urban creation by building cities and towns where people can live in safety and security.  By upholding the company’s philosophy and vision, Takenaka Corporation is continuing to turn dreams into reality for a sustainable future.
postedCompany.name: TAKENAKA CORPORATION

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
